quiz.savol: pg paketida Client va Pool ning farqi nima?

variantlar.B: Client bitta ulanish, Pool bir nechta ulanishlarni boshqaradi

quiz.tushuntirish: Client — bitta ulanish, qo'lda connect/end qilish kerak. Pool — ulanishlar to'plami, avtomatik boshqaradi. Web serverlarda Pool tavsiya etiladi chunki har so'rov uchun yangi ulanish ochish qimmat.

quiz.savol: pg da SQL parametrlar qanday yoziladi?

variantlar.B: ? belgisi bilan

quiz.tushuntirish: pg paketi $1, $2, $3... placeholder laridan foydalanadi. Qiymatlar ikkinchi argument sifatida massiv ko'rinishida beriladi: query('...WHERE id=$1', [userId])

quiz.savol: Transaction da client.release() nima qiladi?

variantlar.B: Ulanishni Pool ga qaytaradi

quiz.tushuntirish: pool.connect() bilan olingan client foydalanilgandan keyin release() bilan Pool ga qaytarilishi shart. Aks holda Pool to'lib qoladi va yangi ulanishlar kutib qoladi.

quiz.savol: result.rowCount nima qaytaradi?

variantlar.B: So'rov ta'sir qilgan (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) qatorlar soni

quiz.tushuntirish: rowCount INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE uchun ta'sir qilgan qatorlar sonini ko'rsatadi. SELECT uchun esa rows.length ishlatiladi (rowCount null yoki rows soni bo'lishi mumkin).

quiz.savol: SSL sozlamasi qachon kerak?

variantlar.B: Production muhitda masofaviy serverga xavfsiz ulanish uchun

quiz.tushuntirish: Railway, Supabase, AWS RDS kabi cloud PostgreSQL larga ulanishda SSL shart. rejectUnauthorized: false — sertifikatni tekshirmaydi (oddiy production uchun yetarli, lekin eng xavfsiz emas).

topshiriq.vazifa: Node.js da Express API yarating: GET /products (barcha mahsulotlar), POST /products (yangi qo'shish), GET /products/:id (bitta), DELETE /products/:id. pg Pool ishlatib, SYNAPSE loyihasidagi pattern bilan yozing.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: CRUD API ishlaydigan holda. Postman/curl bilan test qilinadi.

pdf_reference: node-postgres Official Docs — https://node-postgres.com/. Qo'shimcha: Express.js + PostgreSQL REST API tutorial.

mavzu: Query Optimization — EXPLAIN ANALYZE, Slow Query
nazariya:
So'rovlarni optimallashtirish — production PostgreSQL da eng muhim ko'nikma. Sekin so'rovlar foydalanuvchi tajribasini yomonlashtiradi va server resurslarini isrof qiladi.

**EXPLAIN** — bajarilish rejasini ko'rsatadi (haqiqatda bajarmaydi):
```sql
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = 'test@test.com';
```

**EXPLAIN ANALYZE** — haqiqatda bajaradi va vaqtni o'lchaydi:
```sql
EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = 'test@test.com';
```

**EXPLAIN ANALYZE BUFFERS** — buffer/cache ma'lumotlari:
```sql
EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT TEXT) 
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = 5;
```

**Natijani o'qish**:
```
Seq Scan on users  (cost=0.00..450.00 rows=1 width=100)
                    (actual time=0.050..12.345 rows=1 loops=1)
```
- **cost**: taxminiy narx (1-chi: boshlash narxi, 2-chi: to'liq)
- **rows**: taxminiy qatorlar soni
- **actual time**: haqiqiy vaqt (ms)
- **loops**: necha marta takrorlandi

**Scan turlari**:
- `Seq Scan` — ketma-ket o'qish (katta jadvallarda sekin, index yo'q)
- `Index Scan` — index orqali (tez, lekin bir nechta qator uchun)
- `Index Only Scan` — faqat index (eng tez, ustun index da bo'lganda)
- `Bitmap Heap Scan` — ko'p qatorlarda foydali

**Index yaratish**:
```sql
-- B-Tree (default, tenglik va tartib uchun)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);

-- Composite index
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_date ON orders(user_id, created_at);

-- Partial index (filtrlangan)
CREATE INDEX idx_active_users ON users(email) WHERE is_active = true;

-- INCLUDE (Index Only Scan uchun)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_email_incl ON users(email) INCLUDE (ism, yosh);
```

**Sekin so'rovlarni topish**:
```sql
-- pg_stat_statements extension
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_stat_statements;

-- Eng sekin 5 ta so'rov
SELECT query, calls, total_exec_time/calls AS avg_ms, rows
FROM pg_stat_statements
ORDER BY avg_ms DESC
LIMIT 5;

-- Eng ko'p chaqirilgan
SELECT query, calls FROM pg_stat_statements
ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 10;
```

**Statistika yangilash** (planer uchun muhim):
```sql
ANALYZE users;    -- Bitta jadval
ANALYZE;         -- Barcha jadvallar
VACUUM ANALYZE;  -- Tozalash + statistika
```

**JOIN optimizatsiyasi**:
```sql
-- Yomon (N+1 muammo):
SELECT * FROM orders;
-- Keyin har biri uchun alohida:
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = order.user_id;

-- Yaxshi (bitta JOIN):
SELECT o.*, u.ism FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id;
```

**Amaliy maslahatlar**:
```sql
-- WHERE da funksiya ishlatmang:
-- Yomon (index ishlatmaydi):
WHERE LOWER(email) = 'ali@test.com'

-- Yaxshi (functional index):
CREATE INDEX ON users(LOWER(email));
WHERE LOWER(email) = 'ali@test.com'

-- LIMIT bilan ordering:
SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
-- created_at da index bo'lishi muhim!

-- SELECT * o'rniga kerakli ustunlar:
SELECT id, ism FROM users;  -- Emas: SELECT * FROM users
```

**auto_explain extension** — sekin so'rovlarni avtomatik log ga yozish:
```
# postgresql.conf
shared_preload_libraries = 'auto_explain'
auto_explain.log_min_duration = 1000  # 1 soniyadan ko'p
auto_explain.log_analyze = on
```

quiz.savol: EXPLAIN va EXPLAIN ANALYZE farqi nima?

variantlar.B: EXPLAIN rejani ko'rsatadi, EXPLAIN ANALYZE haqiqatda bajarib vaqtni o'lchaydi
variantlar.C: ANALYZE katta jadvallar uchun, EXPLAIN kichik uchun

quiz.tushuntirish: EXPLAIN faqat reja (plan) ni ko'rsatadi. EXPLAIN ANALYZE so'rovni haqiqatda bajarib taxminiy va haqiqiy vaqt/qatorlarni taqqoslaydi. INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE uchun ehtiyot bo'ling — haqiqatda o'zgartiriladi.

quiz.savol: Seq Scan nima va qachon muammo?

variantlar.A: Har doim muammo, doim oldini olish kerak
variantlar.B: Butun jadvalni ketma-ket o'qiydi; katta jadvallarda ko'p qatorda sekin

quiz.tushuntirish: Seq Scan kichik jadvallarda yoki ko'p qatorni qaytarishda normal. Katta jadvalda kam qatorni qidirishda (masalan email bo'yicha bitta foydalanuvchi) Index Scan kerak.

quiz.savol: pg_stat_statements nima uchun ishlatiladi?

variantlar.B: Barcha bajarilgan so'rovlarni, ularning vaqti va chaqirish sonini kuzatish

quiz.tushuntirish: pg_stat_statements extension barcha bajarilgan SQL so'rovlarini qayd qiladi: necha marta chaqirilgani, o'rtacha va jami vaqt. Bu sekin so'rovlarni topishning eng yaxshi usuli.

quiz.savol: Partial index qachon foydali?

variantlar.B: WHERE sharti bilan faqat ma'lum qatorlar kichik subset uchun

quiz.tushuntirish: CREATE INDEX ON users(email) WHERE is_active = true — faqat active foydalanuvchilar uchun index. Oddiy indexdan kichikroq, tezroq yangilanadi va qidirish tezroq bo'ladi.

quiz.savol: WHERE LOWER(email) = 'x' nima uchun sekin bo'lishi mumkin?

variantlar.B: Funksiya ichida argument bo'lganda oddiy index ishlatilmaydi

quiz.tushuntirish: WHERE LOWER(email) = 'x' da email ustunidagi oddiy index ishlatilmaydi. Yechim: CREATE INDEX ON users(LOWER(email)) — functional index yaratish.

topshiriq.vazifa: 100,000 ta qatorlik orders jadvali (id, user_id, amount, created_at, status) yarating (generate_series bilan). Index OLDIN va KEYIN EXPLAIN ANALYZE vaqtini solishtiring. pg_stat_statements dan eng sekin so'rovni toping.
topshiriq.starter_kod:
-- 1. Jadval va ko'p ma'lumot yaratish
CREATE TABLE big_orders (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  amount NUMERIC(10,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  status TEXT
);

INSERT INTO big_orders (user_id, amount, created_at, status)
SELECT 
  (random() * 1000)::INT,
  (random() * 10000)::NUMERIC(10,2),
  NOW() - (random() * INTERVAL '365 days'),
  CASE WHEN random() < 0.7 THEN 'completed' ELSE 'pending' END
FROM generate_series(1, 100000);

-- 2. EXPLAIN ANALYZE (index siz)
EXPLAIN ANALYZE 
SELECT * FROM big_orders WHERE user_id = 500;

-- 3. Index qo'shing
-- CREATE INDEX ...

-- 4. EXPLAIN ANALYZE (index bilan)

-- 5. pg_stat_statements dan top 3 sekin so'rov
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: Index siz: Seq Scan, 10-50ms. Index bilan: Index Scan, <1ms.

pdf_reference: PostgreSQL 16 Documentation — Chapter 14: Performance Tips, Chapter 28.2: pg_stat_statements. Qo'shimcha: 'PostgreSQL Query Optimization' — Henrietta Dombrovskaya.

nazariya:
Connection pooling — ma'lumotlar bazasiga ulanishlarni qayta ishlatish texnikasi. Har so'rov uchun yangi PostgreSQL ulanishi ochish juda qimmat (30-50ms, 5-10MB RAM). PgBouncer ulanishlarni to'plab, samarali boshqaradi.

**Muammo**: 1000 ta foydalanuvchi bor → 1000 ta ulanish → PostgreSQL xotirasidan chiqib ketadi.
**Yechim**: 1000 ta foydalanuvchi → PgBouncer → 20-50 ta haqiqiy PostgreSQL ulanish.

**PgBouncer o'rnatish**:
```bash
# Ubuntu/Debian
sudo apt install pgbouncer

# Docker
docker run -d --name pgbouncer \
  -e DATABASES_HOST=localhost \
  -e DATABASES_PORT=5432 \
  -e DATABASES_USER=postgres \
  -e DATABASES_PASSWORD=parol \
  -e DATABASES_DBNAME=mydb \
  -p 6432:6432 \
  edoburu/pgbouncer
```

**pgbouncer.ini konfiguratsiya**:
```ini
[databases]
mydb = host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 dbname=mydb

[pgbouncer]
listen_port = 6432
listen_addr = 127.0.0.1
auth_type = md5
auth_file = /etc/pgbouncer/userlist.txt

; Pool mode (muhim!)
pool_mode = transaction

; Ulanish limitlar
max_client_conn = 1000  ; Ilova tomonidan
default_pool_size = 20  ; PostgreSQL tomonidan
min_pool_size = 5
reserve_pool_size = 5
reserve_pool_timeout = 3

; Monitoring
stats_period = 60
log_stats = 1
```

**userlist.txt**:
```
"postgres" "md5_hashed_password"
# yoki oddiy parol:
"postgres" "parol"
```

**Pool mode turlari**:

1. **session** (default) — ulanish sessiya bo'yi band (eng sekin, lekin to'liq mos)
```
pool_mode = session
```

2. **transaction** (tavsiya, tez) — har bir transaction uchun ulanish (ko'p ilovalarda eng yaxshi)
```
pool_mode = transaction
# Muhim: transaction mode da SET, LISTEN/NOTIFY, prepared statements cheklovlari bor!
```

3. **statement** (eng tez, cheklovlar ko'p) — har bir SQL statement uchun
```
pool_mode = statement
# Multi-statement transaction ishlamaydi!
```

**Node.js da PgBouncer bilan ulanish**:
```javascript
const pool = new Pool({
  host: 'localhost',
  port: 6432,          // PgBouncer port!
  database: 'mydb',
  user: 'postgres',
  password: 'parol',
  max: 10              // Ilova poolidan ham foydalanamiz
});
```

**Monitoring — PgBouncer admin konsoli**:
```bash
psql -h localhost -p 6432 -U pgbouncer pgbouncer
```

```sql
-- Joriy ulanishlar holati
SHOW POOLS;

-- Statistika
SHOW STATS;

-- Hozirgi ulanishlar
SHOW CLIENTS;

-- Server ulanishlari
SHOW SERVERS;

-- Ulanishlarni to'xtatish
PAUSE mydb;
RESUME mydb;
```

**Railway/Supabase Pooler** — cloud servislar odatda o'rnatilgan pooler taqdim etadi:
```
# Supabase Connection Pooler URL:
postgresql://user:pass@db.xxx.supabase.co:6543/postgres
# 6543 — Supabase PgBouncer porti

# To'g'ridan-to'g'ri:
postgresql://user:pass@db.xxx.supabase.co:5432/postgres
```

**max_client_conn hisoblash**:
- Har bir ilova instansida max 10-20 ulanish
- 5 ta server instance → 50-100 client conn
- PostgreSQL max_connections = 100 → PgBouncer pool_size = 80

**PgBouncer vs pgpool-II**:
- PgBouncer — sodda, tez, faqat pooling
- pgpool-II — pooling + load balancing + replication — murakkab

quiz.savol: Connection pooling nima muammoni hal qiladi?

variantlar.B: Har so'rov uchun yangi ulanish ochishning qimmatligini hal qiladi

quiz.tushuntirish: PostgreSQL ulanishi ochish ~30-50ms va ~5-10MB RAM talab qiladi. 1000 foydalanuvchi = 1000 ulanish = resurs tanqisligi. PgBouncer ulanishlarni qayta ishlatib, 1000 foydalanuvchini 20-50 haqiqiy ulanish bilan xizmat qiladi.

quiz.savol: PgBouncer standart porti qancha?
quiz.tushuntirish: PgBouncer standart 6432 portida tinglaydi, PostgreSQL esa 5432 da. Ilova 6432 ga ulanadi → PgBouncer 5432 dagi PostgreSQL ga yo'naltiradi.

quiz.savol: transaction pool mode qachon tavsiya etiladi?

variantlar.B: Ko'p foydalanuvchili web ilovalarda — tez va samarali

quiz.tushuntirish: Transaction mode da ulanish faqat transaction davomida band bo'ladi. Ko'p ilovalar uchun eng maqbul. Lekin session darajasidagi buyruqlar (SET, PREPARE) ishlamaydi.

quiz.savol: default_pool_size nima anglatadi?

variantlar.B: Har bir database/user juftligi uchun PostgreSQL ga ochilgan ulanishlar soni

quiz.tushuntirish: default_pool_size PgBouncer PostgreSQL ga qancha haqiqiy ulanish ochishini belgilaydi. max_client_conn esa ilovalarga qancha ulanish berishi. Odatda: max_client_conn >> default_pool_size.

quiz.savol: SHOW POOLS buyrug'i qayerda bajariladi?

variantlar.B: PgBouncer admin konsolida (pgbouncer database ga ulanib)

quiz.tushuntirish: psql -p 6432 -U pgbouncer pgbouncer — PgBouncer ning maxsus admin bazasiga ulanish. Bu yerda SHOW POOLS, SHOW STATS, SHOW CLIENTS kabi monitoring buyruqlari ishlaydi.

topshiriq.vazifa: PgBouncer ni Docker bilan ishga tushiring yoki pgbouncer.ini konfiguratsiya faylini to'liq yozing. Node.js ilovangizni PgBouncer orqali ulanishga sozlang va SHOW POOLS natijasini tushuntiring.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: Node.js 6432 portiga ulanib PostgreSQL versiyasini chiqaradi. SHOW POOLS cl_active va sv_active ko'rsatadi.

pdf_reference: PgBouncer Official Documentation — https://www.pgbouncer.org/config.html. Qo'shimcha: 'PostgreSQL High Performance' — 11-bob, Supabase Connection Pooling docs.

nazariya:
MongoDB — bu hujjatga asoslangan (document-oriented) NoSQL ma'lumotlar bazasi. U ma'lumotlarni JSON-ga o'xshash BSON (Binary JSON) formatida saqlaydi. Relyatsion ma'lumotlar bazalaridan farqli o'laroq, MongoDB da jadvallar o'rniga 'collection' (kolleksiya), qatorlar o'rniga 'document' (hujjat) ishlatiladi.

**MongoDB vs SQL farqlari:**
- SQL: Database → Table → Row → Column
- MongoDB: Database → Collection → Document → Field

**Asosiy tushunchalar:**
1. **Document** — JSON-ga o'xshash obyekt. Masalan: `{ name: 'Ali', age: 25, city: 'Toshkent' }`
2. **Collection** — bir turdagi documentlar to'plami (SQL dagi table)
3. **Database** — collectionlar to'plami
4. **_id** — har bir documentning avtomatik yaratilgan unikal identifikatori (ObjectId)

**O'rnatish (Windows/Mac/Linux):**
Rasmiy saytdan https://www.mongodb.com/try/download/community yuklab o'rnating. Yoki Docker orqali:
```bash
docker pull mongo
docker run -d -p 27017:27017 --name mongodb mongo
```

**MongoDB Shell (mongosh) bilan ishlash:**
```bash
# Shell ishga tushirish
mongosh

# Mavjud databaselarni ko'rish
show dbs

# Database tanlash yoki yaratish
use synapse_db

# Mavjud collectionlarni ko'rish
show collections

# Joriy database
db
```

**MongoDB Compass** — bu MongoDB uchun grafik interfeys (GUI). U orqali:
- Databaselar va collectionlarni vizual ko'rish
- Documentlarni qo'shish, tahrirlash, o'chirish
- Querylarni sinab ko'rish
- Index va schema'ni tahlil qilish mumkin.

Compassni https://www.mongodb.com/products/compass sahifasidan yuklab olish mumkin. O'rnatgach, connection string sifatida `mongodb://localhost:27017` kiriting va ulanib, databaselaringizni ko'ring.

**Birinchi document yaratish:**
```javascript
use synapse_db

db.students.insertOne({
  name: 'Mukhammad',
  age: 20,
  course: 'Python',
  xp: 150,
  createdAt: new Date()
})

// Natija:
// { acknowledged: true, insertedId: ObjectId('...') }
```

**MongoDB ning afzalliklari:**
- Flexible schema — har bir document turli fieldlarga ega bo'lishi mumkin
- Horizontal scaling (sharding) oson
- Nested objects va arrays ni to'g'ridan-to'g'ri saqlash
- Big data va real-time applicationlar uchun ideal
- JSON bilan to'g'ridan-to'g'ri ishlash (JavaScript developers uchun qulay)

**Kamchiliklari:**
- JOIN operatsiyalari yo'q (lookup bilan qisman hal qilinadi)
- ACID transactions (4.0 versiyadan qo'shilgan, lekin SQL dan sekinroq)
- Ko'p xotira sarflashi mumkin

quiz.savol: MongoDB da ma'lumotlar qaysi formatda saqlanadi?
quiz.B: CSV
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB ma'lumotlarni BSON (Binary JSON) formatida saqlaydi. Bu JSON ning binary versiyasi bo'lib, qo'shimcha ma'lumot turlarini (Date, ObjectId va h.k.) qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.

quiz.savol: MongoDB da SQL dagi 'table' ga nima mos keladi?
quiz.B: Collection
quiz.tushuntirish: SQL: Table = MongoDB: Collection. SQL: Row = MongoDB: Document. SQL: Column = MongoDB: Field.

quiz.savol: MongoDB Shell da joriy databaseni ko'rsatish uchun qaysi buyruq ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: current db
quiz.tushuntirish: `db` buyrug'i joriy tanlangan databaseni ko'rsatadi. `show dbs` esa barcha mavjud databaselarni ro'yxatini chiqaradi.

quiz.savol: MongoDB dagi har bir document uchun avtomatik yaratiluvchi unikal identifikator nima deyiladi?
quiz.B: primary_key
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB har bir documentga `_id` fieldini avtomatik qo'shadi. U odatda ObjectId tipida bo'lib, 12 baytli unikal identifikatordir.

quiz.savol: MongoDB Compass nima?
quiz.B: MongoDB uchun grafik interfeys (GUI)
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB Compass — bu MongoDB ma'lumotlarini vizual ko'rish, tahrirlash va query yozish imkonini beruvchi grafik interfeys dasturi. Command line o'rniga foydalaniladi.

topshiriq.vazifa: MongoDB'ni o'rnating va 'synapse_db' databaseida 'users' collectionini yarating. Kamida 3 ta user document qo'shing (name, email, age, course, xp fieldlari bilan). Keyin barcha documentlarni ko'rsating.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: 3 ta user document muvaffaqiyatli qo'shiladi. find() buyrug'i barcha 3 documentni _id bilan birga ko'rsatadi.
topshiriq.yechim:
use synapse_db

db.users.insertMany([
  { name: 'Ali Karimov', email: 'ali@gmail.com', age: 22, course: 'Python', xp: 200 },
  { name: 'Zulfiya Rahimova', email: 'zulfiya@gmail.com', age: 20, course: 'Web', xp: 350 },
  { name: 'Sardor Toshmatov', email: 'sardor@gmail.com', age: 25, course: 'Data Analysis', xp: 180 }
])

db.users.find().pretty()

pdf_reference: MongoDB Documentation: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/introduction/ | MongoDB Compass: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/compass/current/

quiz.savol: MongoDB da bitta document qo'shish uchun qaysi method ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: db.collection.insertOne()
quiz.tushuntirish: Bitta document qo'shish uchun `insertOne()` ishlatiladi. Ko'p document uchun `insertMany()`. Eski `insert()` method deprecated bo'lgan.

quiz.savol: MongoDB da raqam fieldni 10 ga oshirish uchun qaysi operator ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: $add
quiz.tushuntirish: `$inc` (increment) operatori raqam fieldni berilgan qiymatga oshiradi yoki kamaytiradi. Masalan: `{ $inc: { xp: 10 } }` xp ni 10 ga oshiradi.

quiz.savol: updateOne va replaceOne ning farqi nima?
quiz.B: updateOne tezroq ishlaydi
quiz.C: replaceOne butun documentni almashtiradi, updateOne faqat ko'rsatilgan fieldlarni
quiz.tushuntirish: replaceOne butun documentni yangi document bilan almashtiradi (ko'rsatilmagan fieldlar yo'qoladi). updateOne esa $set kabi operatorlar orqali faqat kerakli fieldlarni o'zgartiradi.

quiz.savol: MongoDB da documentlarni narx bo'yicha kamayish tartibida saralash uchun qaysi kod to'g'ri?
quiz.B: db.col.find().sort({ price: -1 })
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB da sort() method da 1 o'sish tartibini (ASC), -1 esa kamayish tartibini (DESC) bildiradi. 'desc' string ishlamaydi.

quiz.savol: upsert: true parametri nima vazifani bajaradi?
quiz.B: Ko'p document yangilaydi
quiz.C: Filter bo'yicha document topilmasa yangi document yaratadi
quiz.tushuntirish: upsert=true bo'lganda: filter bo'yicha document topilsa — yangilaydi, topilmasa — yangi document yaratadi. Bu 'update + insert' kombinatsiyasidir.

topshiriq.vazifa: MongoDB da 'library' databaseida 'books' collectioni yarating. 5 ta kitob qo'shing (title, author, year, genre, rating, available fieldlari). Keyin: 1) Rating 4 dan katta kitoblarni toping, 2) Bitta kitob narxini yangilang, 3) available=false bo'lgan kitoblarni o'chiring.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: 5 ta kitob qo'shiladi. Rating 4+ bo'lganlar ro'yxati chiqadi. Yangilash va o'chirish muvaffaqiyatli bajariladi.
topshiriq.yechim:
use library

db.books.insertMany([
  { title: 'O\'tkan kunlar', author: 'Abdulla Qodiriy', year: 1925, genre: 'Roman', rating: 5, available: true },
  { title: 'Sariq devni minib', author: 'Xudoyberdiyev', year: 1981, genre: 'Roman', rating: 4, available: true },
  { title: 'Clean Code', author: 'Robert Martin', year: 2008, genre: 'Tech', rating: 5, available: false },
  { title: 'The Pragmatic Programmer', author: 'Hunt & Thomas', year: 1999, genre: 'Tech', rating: 4, available: true },
  { title: 'Design Patterns', author: 'Gang of Four', year: 1994, genre: 'Tech', rating: 3, available: false }
])

db.books.find({ rating: { $gt: 4 } })

db.books.updateOne({ title: 'Clean Code' }, { $set: { rating: 5, available: true } })

db.books.deleteMany({ available: false })

pdf_reference: MongoDB CRUD: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/crud/ | Update Operators: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/operator/update/

quiz.savol: MongoDB da 'yosh 18 dan katta yoki teng' shartini yozish uchun qaysi operator to'g'ri?
quiz.B: { age: { $gte: 18 } }
quiz.tushuntirish: $gte (greater than or equal) — katta yoki teng demak. $gt (greater than) — faqat katta. 18 ham kirishi kerak bo'lgani uchun $gte ishlatiladi.

quiz.savol: $in operatori qanday ishlaydi?
quiz.A: Field qiymat ro'yxatiga kiritilgan qiymatlardan biriga teng bo'lsa true qaytaradi
quiz.B: Field ko'rsatilgan raqamdan katta bo'lsa true qaytaradi
quiz.D: Field ro'yxatdagi barcha qiymatlarga teng bo'lishi kerak
quiz.tushuntirish: $in operatori field qiymati berilgan ro'yxatdagi qiymatlardan BIRIGA teng bo'lsa mos documentni qaytaradi. SQL dagi IN operatoriga o'xshash.

quiz.savol: { $and: [ {a:1}, {b:2} ] } qaysi SQL buyrug'iga ekvivalent?
quiz.B: WHERE a=1 AND b=2
quiz.tushuntirish: $and operatori barcha shartlar bajarilishi kerakligini bildiradi, bu SQL dagi AND ga to'g'ri keladi. $or esa SQL dagi OR ga.

quiz.savol: Email field mavjud bo'lmagan documentlarni topish uchun qaysi query to'g'ri?
quiz.B: db.users.find({ email: { $exists: false } })
quiz.tushuntirish: $exists: false email field umuman mavjud bo'lmagan documentlarni topadi. $exists: true esa field mavjud documentlarni topadi.

quiz.savol: Narxi 200 dan katta VA 1000 dan kichik mahsulotlarni topish uchun qaysi usul to'g'riroq?
quiz.B: db.products.find({ price: { $gt: 200, $lt: 1000 } })
quiz.tushuntirish: Bir xil field uchun bir nechta shart berilganda, ularni bitta obyektda yozish to'g'ri: { price: { $gt: 200, $lt: 1000 } }. A variant noto'g'ri, chunki JavaScript da bir xil kalit ikki marta yozilmaydi.

topshiriq.vazifa: SYNAPSE users collectionida quyidagi querylarni bajaring: 1) XP 150 dan 400 gacha bo'lgan foydalanuvchilar, 2) Python YOKI Web kursidagi foydalanuvchilar, 3) Yoshi 18+ va premium bo'lmagan foydalanuvchilar, 4) Ismi 'A' harfi bilan boshlanuvchi foydalanuvchilar.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: 1) Ali, Aziz, Malika (xp: 200, 300, 175) | 2) Ali, Barno, Jasur, Malika | 3) Ali, Aziz, Malika | 4) Ali, Aziz
topshiriq.yechim:
db.users.find({ xp: { $gte: 150, $lte: 400 } })

db.users.find({ course: { $in: ['Python', 'Web'] } })

db.users.find({ $and: [ { age: { $gte: 18 } }, { isPremium: { $ne: true } } ] })

db.users.find({ name: { $regex: /^A/i } })

pdf_reference: MongoDB Query Operators: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/operator/query/

quiz.savol: Aggregation Pipeline da filterlash uchun qaysi stage ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: $where
quiz.tushuntirish: $match stage SQL dagi WHERE ga o'xshaydi va documentlarni filterlaydi. $match ni pipeline boshida qo'llash samaradorligini oshiradi, chunki keyingi stagelar uchun ma'lumot hajmi kamayadi.

quiz.savol: $group stage da { $sum: 1 } nima qiladi?
quiz.B: Har bir document uchun 1 qo'shib, guruh elementlari sonini hisoblaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: { $sum: 1 } guruhning har bir documentida 1 qo'shadi, bu esa guruh ichidagi elementlar sonini (COUNT) hisoblaydi. SQL dagi COUNT(*) ga ekvivalent.

quiz.savol: MongoDB da SQL dagi JOIN ga qaysi aggregation stage to'g'ri keladi?
quiz.B: $merge
quiz.tushuntirish: $lookup stage ikki collectionni birlashtirish uchun ishlatiladi, bu SQL dagi LEFT JOIN ga o'xshaydi. from, localField, foreignField va as parametrlarini talab qiladi.

quiz.savol: $unwind stage nima qiladi?
quiz.B: Arrayni bo'lib, har element uchun alohida document yaratadi
quiz.tushuntirish: $unwind array field ni bo'lib, har bir array elementi uchun alohida document yaratadi. Masalan, tags: ['a', 'b'] bo'lsa, ikki alohida document: biri tags: 'a', ikkinchisi tags: 'b'.

quiz.savol: Pipeline stage larning ketma-ketligi samaradorlikka ta'sir qiladimi?
quiz.B: Ha, $match va $sort ni boshroq qo'yish tezlikni oshiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: Ha, samaradorlik uchun $match ni imkon qadar boshroq (birinchi yoki index bor joyda) qo'yish kerak. Bu keyingi stagelar uchun ma'lumot hajmini kamaytiradi. $sort ham index bor joyda ishlatilsa tezroq.

topshiriq.vazifa: SYNAPSE platformasi uchun aggregation pipeline yozing: 1) Har bir kurs bo'yicha foydalanuvchilar soni va o'rtacha XP ni hisoblang, 2) Faqat 2 va undan ko'p foydalanuvchisi bor kurslarni ko'rsating, 3) O'rtacha XP bo'yicha kamayish tartibida saralang.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: Python: 2 user, avgXP 325 | Web: 2 user, avgXP 250. Data Analysis 1 user bo'lgani uchun chiqmaydi.

pdf_reference: MongoDB Aggregation: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/aggregation/ | Pipeline Stages: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/reference/operator/aggregation-pipeline/

quiz.savol: explain() natijasida 'COLLSCAN' ko'rsatkichi nima anglatadi?
quiz.B: Query barcha documentlarni ko'rib chiqmoqda (collection scan) — sekin
quiz.tushuntirish: COLLSCAN (Collection Scan) — MongoDB barcha documentlarni birma-bir ko'rib chiqmoqda, index ishlatilmayapti. Bu katta collectionlarda juda sekin. IXSCAN esa index ishlatilayotganini bildiradi.

quiz.savol: TTL Index qanday maqsadda ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Ma'lum vaqtdan keyin documentlarni avtomatik o'chirish
quiz.tushuntirish: TTL (Time To Live) Index expireAfterSeconds parametri bilan berilgan vaqtdan keyin documentlarni avtomatik o'chiradi. Session, log, cache ma'lumotlari uchun ideal.

quiz.savol: Compound index da { course: 1, xp: -1 } yaratilgan bo'lsa, qaysi query bu indexdan foyda ko'ra olmaydi?
quiz.B: db.users.find({ course: 'Python' }).sort({ xp: -1 })
quiz.tushuntirish: Compound index prefix qoidasiga ko'ra, index birinchi fieldsiz (course) ishlatilmaydi. Faqat xp bo'yicha qidirishda bu index yordam bermaydi.

quiz.savol: Unique index nima qiladi?
quiz.B: Collectionda bir xil qiymat bir marta bo'lishini ta'minlaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: Unique index berilgan fieldda takroriy qiymatlar bo'lishiga yo'l qo'ymaydi. Masalan, email field uchun unique index qo'yilsa, bir xil email ikki marta qo'shilishi imkonsiz bo'ladi.

quiz.savol: Ko'p index yaratishning salbiy tomoni nima?
quiz.A: Disk hajmi ortishi va yozish operatsiyalari sekinlashishi
quiz.B: O'qish operatsiyalari sekinlashishi
quiz.tushuntirish: Har bir yangi index disk hajmini egallaydi va insert/update/delete operatsiyalarini sekinlashtiradi, chunki indexlar ham yangilanishi kerak. Shuning uchun faqat kerakli fieldlarga index yarating.

topshiriq.vazifa: users collectionida quyidagilarni bajaring: 1) Email uchun unique index yarating, 2) Course va XP uchun compound index yarating, 3) explain() yordamida indexsiz va indeksli querylarni solishtiring, 4) Session uchun 1 daqiqadan keyin o'chuvchi TTL index yarating.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: Email unique index yaratiladi. Compound index yaratiladi. explain() da IXSCAN ko'rinadi. Sessions 60 soniyadan keyin o'chadi.
topshiriq.yechim:
db.users.createIndex({ email: 1 }, { unique: true })

db.users.createIndex({ course: 1, xp: -1 })

db.users.find({ course: 'Python' }).explain('executionStats')
// executionStats.executionStages.stage === 'IXSCAN' bo'lishi kerak

db.sessions.createIndex({ createdAt: 1 }, { expireAfterSeconds: 60 })

db.users.getIndexes()

pdf_reference: MongoDB Indexes: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/indexes/ | Query Optimization: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/query-optimization/

quiz.savol: Qaysi holatda Embedding (ichiga joylashtirish) yaxshiroq?
quiz.B: Foydalanuvchi va uning 2-3 ta manzili
quiz.C: Talaba va uning barcha kursdoshlarining ma'lumotlari
quiz.tushuntirish: Embedding 1-to-few munosabatlar uchun ideal. 2-3 ta manzil (few) har doim foydalanuvchi bilan birga o'qiladi, mustaqil mavjud bo'lmaydi. Minglab buyurtmalar yoki ko'p kommentlar uchun reference ishlatish to'g'riroq.

quiz.savol: MongoDB documentning maksimal hajmi qancha?
quiz.B: 16 MB
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB da bitta document maksimum 16 MB bo'lishi mumkin. Embedding ishlatilganda bu chegarani hisobga olish kerak. Katta ma'lumotlar uchun GridFS yoki reference ishlatiladi.

quiz.savol: E-commerce da buyurtma (order) documentida mahsulot narxini embed qilish nima uchun to'g'ri?
quiz.B: Narx keyinchalik o'zgarsa, eski buyurtma o'sha paytdagi narxni saqlashi uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Buyurtmada mahsulot narxini snapshot sifatida embed qilish muhim, chunki mahsulot narxi keyinchalik o'zgarishi mumkin. Lekin eski buyurtma o'sha paytdagi haqiqiy narxni ko'rsatishi kerak. Bu 'snapshot pattern' deyiladi.

quiz.savol: Ko'p-to-ko'p (M:N) munosabat uchun qaysi yondashuv to'g'ri?
quiz.B: Reference ishlatish va alohida junction collection
quiz.tushuntirish: M:N munosabatlar uchun (masalan, student-course: bir student ko'p kursda, bir kursda ko'p student) reference va alohida junction collection ishlatish to'g'ri. Yoki bir tarafga ObjectId array embed qilish mumkin.

quiz.savol: $lookup nimani bajaradi?
quiz.B: Index yaratadi
quiz.C: Ikki collection ni birlashtiradi (SQL JOINga o'xshash)
quiz.tushuntirish: $lookup aggregation stage ikkita collection ni birlashtiradi — SQL dagi LEFT OUTER JOIN ga o'xshaydi. from, localField, foreignField va as parametrlari talab qilinadi.

topshiriq.vazifa: SYNAPSE platformasi uchun schema dizayni yarating: 1) users collection (embed: settings, last 5 achievements), 2) courses collection, 3) enrollments collection (reference: userId, courseId; embed: progress snapshot). Keyin $lookup bilan user va kurs ma'lumotlarini birlashtiring.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: 3 ta collection yaratiladi. $lookup user + enrollment ma'lumotlarini birlashtiradi.
topshiriq.yechim:
const userId = db.users.insertOne({ name: 'Ali', email: 'ali@gmail.com', settings: { theme: 'dark', language: 'uz' }, recentAchievements: [{ title: 'Birinchi dars', earnedAt: new Date() }] }).insertedId

const courseId = db.courses.insertOne({ title: 'Python Dasturlash', totalLessons: 40, instructor: 'Mukhammad' }).insertedId

db.enrollments.insertOne({ userId: userId, courseId: courseId, progress: 25, enrolledAt: new Date() })

db.enrollments.aggregate([
  { $lookup: { from: 'users', localField: 'userId', foreignField: '_id', as: 'userInfo' } },
  { $lookup: { from: 'courses', localField: 'courseId', foreignField: '_id', as: 'courseInfo' } },
  { $project: { 'userInfo.name': 1, 'courseInfo.title': 1, progress: 1 } }
])

pdf_reference: MongoDB Schema Design: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/data-modeling/ | Data Model Design: https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/data-model-design/

quiz.savol: Mongoose nima?
quiz.B: Node.js uchun MongoDB ODM kutubxonasi
quiz.tushuntirish: Mongoose — MongoDB Object Document Mapper. U Node.js da MongoDB bilan ishlashni soddalashtiradi, schema, validatsiya, middleware va boshqa qulayliklarni qo'shadi.

quiz.savol: Mongoose Schema da required: [true, 'Xabar'] qanday ishlaydi?
quiz.A: Field majburiy, qiymat yo'q bo'lsa 'Xabar' errorini beradi
quiz.B: Field ixtiyoriy
quiz.tushuntirish: required: [true, 'Xabar'] — field majburiy ekanini va qiymat kiritilmasa qaysi xato xabarini ko'rsatishni bildiradi. Bu validatsiya Mongoose darajasida ishlaydi.

quiz.savol: findByIdAndUpdate da { new: true } parametri nimani bildiradi?
quiz.B: Yangilashdan KEYIN document ni qaytaradi (eski emas)
quiz.D: Faqat birinchi mos kelgan documentni yangilaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: Odatda findByIdAndUpdate yangilashdan OLDINGI documentni qaytaradi. { new: true } qo'shilsa, yangilangandan KEYIN document qaytariladi. Ko'pincha yangilangan qiymatni ko'rish kerak bo'lganda ishlatiladi.

quiz.savol: .lean() methodi qanday foyda beradi?
quiz.B: Plain JavaScript obyekt (POJO) qaytaradi, Mongoose metodlarisiz — tezroq ishlaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: .lean() Mongoose documentini oddiy JavaScript obyektiga aylantiradi. Bu tezroq va kam xotira sarflaydi, chunki Mongoose ning qo'shimcha metodlari bo'lmaydi. Faqat o'qish uchun (save qilmaydigan) holatda ishlatiladi.

quiz.savol: Mongoose da populate() qanday vazifani bajaradi?
quiz.B: Reference (ObjectId) orqali bog'langan document ma'lumotlarini keltiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: populate() ObjectId reference ni haqiqiy document ma'lumotlari bilan almashtiradi. Masalan, userId: ObjectId('...') ni to'liq user documenti bilan almashtiradi — SQL dagi JOIN ga o'xshaydi.

topshiriq.vazifa: Node.js Express ilovasida Mongoose bilan users va courses modellari yarating. User model: name, email, course (enum), xp, isPremium. Course model: title, description, totalLessons. Keyin GET /users va POST /users endpointlari yozing.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: GET /users barcha userslarni xp bo'yicha kamayish tartibida qaytaradi. POST /users yangi user yaratadi yoki validatsiya xatosi beradi.

pdf_reference: Mongoose Documentation: https://mongoosejs.com/docs/ | Mongoose Schemas: https://mongoosejs.com/docs/guide.html

quiz.savol: MongoDB transaction da commitTransaction() va abortTransaction() ning farqi nima?
quiz.B: commitTransaction — o'zgarishlarni saqlaydi, abortTransaction — barcha o'zgarishlarni bekor qiladi
quiz.tushuntirish: commitTransaction() barcha operatsiyalarni doimiy saqlaydi. abortTransaction() esa transaction ichidagi barcha o'zgarishlarni bekor qiladi (rollback). Xato bo'lganda abort, hammasi muvaffaqiyatli bo'lganda commit chaqiriladi.

quiz.savol: Transaction da session parametri nima uchun kerak?
quiz.B: Operatsiyalarni bitta transactionga bog'lash uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB transaction da barcha operatsiyalarga { session } parametri uzatilishi kerak. Bu MongoDB ga 'bu operatsiyalar bitta transaction ga tegishli' deb bildiradi. Sessionsiz operatsiyalar transaction dan tashqarida bajariladi.

quiz.savol: MongoDB Atlas M0 (Free Tier) qancha storage beradi?
quiz.B: 512 MB
quiz.tushuntirish: MongoDB Atlas M0 Free Tier 512 MB shared storage bilan bepul. Bu o'quv va kichik loyihalar uchun yetarli. Production uchun M2, M5 yoki undan katta cluster kerak.

quiz.savol: finally {} bloki transaction da nima uchun ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Commit qilish uchun
quiz.C: Qanday natijada ham session.endSession() chaqirilishini ta'minlash uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: finally bloki try va catch dan qat'iy nazar har doim bajariladi. Transaction da session.endSession() ni finally da chaqirish manbalarni to'g'ri ozod qilishni ta'minlaydi — xato bo'lsa ham, bo'lmasa ham.

quiz.savol: Atlas connection string da 'mongodb+srv://' nima anglatadi?
quiz.B: SRV DNS record orqali ulash — avtomatik cluster discovery va load balancing
quiz.tushuntirish: mongodb+srv:// protokoli DNS SRV record orqali ulanadi. Bu Atlas cluster ning barcha node lari ni avtomatik topadi va load balancing qiladi. Eski mongodb:// o'rniga ishlatiladi.

topshiriq.vazifa: Mongoose bilan pul o'tkazish funksiyasini yozing: ikkita account bor (balance field bilan). fromAccount dan toAccount ga amount o'tkazilsin. Agar fromAccount da yetarli balans bo'lmasa, transaction abort qilinsin.
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: Yetarli balans bo'lganda o'tkazma amalga oshadi. Yetarli bo'lmasa rollback qilinadi va hech qaysi account o'zgarmaydi.

nazariya:
Redis (Remote Dictionary Server) — bu in-memory (xotirada) ma'lumotlar saqlovchi tez key-value store. U asosan cache, session, real-time leaderboard, pub/sub va rate limiting uchun ishlatiladi.

**Redis ning asosiy xususiyatlari:**
- Ma'lumotlar RAMda saqlanadi → juda tez (microsecond latency)
- Diskka yozish (persistence) — RDB snapshot yoki AOF log
- Atomik operatsiyalar
- Pub/Sub xabar almashish
- Lua scripting
- TTL (Time To Live) — avtomatik muddati o'tish

## O'rnatish

```bash
# Ubuntu/Debian
sudo apt install redis-server

# macOS
brew install redis

# Docker (eng qulay)
docker run -d -p 6379:6379 --name redis redis:alpine

# Redis ishlatish
redis-cli
```

## Redis CLI — asosiy buyruqlar

```bash
# Ulanish
redis-cli
redis-cli -h hostname -p 6379 -a password

# Ping — aloqa tekshirish
PING
# Natija: PONG

# Server haqida ma'lumot
INFO server

# Barcha kalitlarni ko'rish
KEYS *
KEYS user:*  # pattern bo'yicha

# Kalitlar soni
DBSIZE

# Ma'lumotlar bazasini tozalash
FLUSHDB   # joriy DB
FLUSHALL  # barcha DB

# Kalit turini bilish
TYPE key_name

# Kalit bormi?
EXISTS key_name
# Natija: 1 (bor) yoki 0 (yo'q)

# Kalitni o'chirish
DEL key_name
DEL key1 key2 key3  # ko'p kalit

# TTL (qolgan vaqt, soniyada)
TTL key_name
# -1 = muddatsiz, -2 = mavjud emas

# TTL belgilash
EXPIRE key_name 3600  # 1 soat

# Muddatni olib tashlash
PERSIST key_name
```

## String operatsiyalari (eng asosiy)

```bash
# Qiymat saqlash
SET name "Ali Karimov"
SET age 25

# TTL bilan saqlash
SET session:abc123 "userId:456" EX 3600
# NX — faqat mavjud bo'lmasa qo'sh
SET lock:resource "1" EX 30 NX

# Qiymat olish
GET name
# Natija: "Ali Karimov"

# Ko'p qiymat bilan ishlash
MSET key1 val1 key2 val2 key3 val3
MGET key1 key2 key3

# Raqamni oshirish/kamaytirish
SET counter 10
INCR counter    # 11
INCRBY counter 5  # 16
DECR counter    # 15
DECRBY counter 3  # 12

# String uzunligi
STRLEN name
```

## Node.js da Redis bilan ishlash

```bash
npm install ioredis
```

```javascript
const Redis = require('ioredis');
const redis = new Redis({
  host: 'localhost',
  port: 6379
  // password: 'yourpassword'
});

// Asosiy operatsiyalar
await redis.set('user:123', JSON.stringify({ name: 'Ali', xp: 200 }));
await redis.expire('user:123', 3600);

const data = await redis.get('user:123');
const user = JSON.parse(data);

// TTL bilan birga saqlash
await redis.setex('token:abc', 3600, 'userId:123');

// O'chirish
await redis.del('user:123');

// Mavjudligini tekshirish
const exists = await redis.exists('user:123');
```

**Redis ning asosiy ishlatilish holatlari SYNAPSE da:**
- Session cache: `session:{token}` → userId (1 soat TTL)
- Leaderboard: Sorted Set bilan XP reytingi
- Rate limiting: `ratelimit:{ip}` → so'rovlar soni
- API cache: `cache:courses` → kurs ro'yxati (10 daqiqa)

quiz.savol: Redis asosan qanday maqsadda ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Relatsion ma'lumotlar saqlash
quiz.C: Cache, session va real-time ma'lumotlar uchun in-memory store
quiz.tushuntirish: Redis in-memory (RAMda) ishlaydi, shuning uchun microsecond latency bilan tez javob beradi. Cache, session management, leaderboard, pub/sub va rate limiting uchun eng keng tarqalgan.

quiz.savol: Redis da TTL -1 nimani anglatadi?
quiz.B: Kalit mavjud emas
quiz.tushuntirish: TTL -1 = kalit expire o'rnatilmagan, abadiy saqlanadi. TTL -2 = kalit umuman mavjud emas. TTL musbat son = qolgan soniyalar.

quiz.savol: SET key value EX 3600 NX nima qiladi?
quiz.B: Kalit mavjud bo'lmasa saqlaydi, 3600 soniyada o'chadi
quiz.tushuntirish: EX 3600 — TTL 3600 soniya. NX (Not eXists) — faqat kalit mavjud bo'lmasa qo'shadi. Bu pattern distributed lock uchun keng ishlatiladi.

quiz.savol: INCR buyrug'i faqat qaysi ma'lumot turi uchun ishlaydi?
quiz.B: Raqam (integer) saqlovchi string
quiz.tushuntirish: INCR Redis da string sifatida saqlangan raqamni 1 ga oshiradi. Kalit bo'lmasa, 0 dan boshlaydi va 1 qaytaradi. Raqam bo'lmagan string bo'lsa xato beradi.

quiz.savol: Redis ma'lumotlari RAM da saqlanadi. Agar server o'chsa ma'lumotlar yo'qoladimi?
quiz.B: Yo'q, avtomatik saqlanadi
quiz.C: RDB snapshot yoki AOF log yoqilgan bo'lsa, ma'lumotlar diskda ham saqlanadi
quiz.tushuntirish: Redis persistence uchun RDB (ma'lum vaqtda snapshot) va AOF (har operatsiyani log ga yozish) rejimlarini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi. Yoqilmasa, server o'chganda ma'lumotlar yo'qoladi. Cache uchun bu muammo emas, lekin session uchun muhim.

topshiriq.vazifa: Redis CLI da quyidagilarni bajaring: 1) 'synapse:user:1' kalitiga user ma'lumotlarini JSON sifatida saqlang, 2 soat TTL bering, 2) Login counter yarating va 5 marta INCR qiling, 3) Visitor counter yarating va TTL ni tekshiring, 4) Pattern bo'yicha barcha 'synapse:*' kalitlarini ko'ring.
topshiriq.starter_kod:
# Redis CLI da bajaring:

# 1. User ma'lumotlarini saqlash (2 soat = 7200 soniya)
SET synapse:user:1 '{"name":"Ali","xp":200}' EX ___

# 2. TTL ni tekshirish
TTL synapse:user:1

# 3. Login counter
SET synapse:logins 0
INCR ___
INCR ___
INCR ___
INCR ___
INCR ___
GET synapse:logins

# 4. Visitor counter (muddatsiz)
SET synapse:visitors 1000
INCRBY synapse:visitors 50

# 5. Barcha synapse kalitlari
KEYS ___

# 6. Kalit turlarini tekshirish
TYPE synapse:user:1
topshiriq.kutilgan_natija: user:1 kaliti 7200 soniya TTL bilan saqlanadi. Login counter 5 ga yetadi. visitors 1050 bo'ladi. KEYS synapse:* 3 ta kalit ko'rsatadi.
topshiriq.yechim:
SET synapse:user:1 '{"name":"Ali","xp":200}' EX 7200
TTL synapse:user:1
SET synapse:logins 0
INCR synapse:logins

mavzu: Redis — String, List, Set, Hash, Sorted Set
nazariya:
Redis 5 ta asosiy ma'lumot turini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi. Har biri turli vaziyatlar uchun mo'ljallangan.

## 1. String
Oddiy key-value. Matn, raqam, JSON, binary saqlash.
```bash
SET user:name "Ali"
GET user:name
SETEX cache:data 300 '{"items":[...]}'
INCR page:views
```

## 2. List (Ro'yxat)
Sirali, takrorlanishi mumkin bo'lgan elementlar ro'yxati. Stack (LIFO) yoki Queue (FIFO) sifatida ishlaydi.

```bash
# Chap tomondan qo'shish (bosh)
LPUSH notifications:user1 "Yangi dars!"
LPUSH notifications:user1 "XP qo'shildi"
LPUSH notifications:user1 "Badge olindi"

# O'ng tomondan qo'shish (oxiri)
RPUSH queue:tasks "task1" "task2" "task3"

# Elementlarni olish
LRANGE notifications:user1 0 -1  # Barchasi
LRANGE notifications:user1 0 2   # Birinchi 3 ta

# Uzunlik
LLEN notifications:user1

# Chap tomondan olish va o'chirish (Queue)
LPOP queue:tasks

# O'ng tomondan olish va o'chirish
RPOP notifications:user1

# Index bo'yicha olish
LINDEX notifications:user1 0

# Faqat N ta element qoldirish
LTRIM notifications:user1 0 9  # Faqat oxirgi 10 ta
```

## 3. Set (To'plam)
Tartibsiz, takrorlanmaydigan elementlar to'plami.

```bash
# Element qo'shish
SADD tags:course1 "python" "backend" "beginner"
SADD tags:course2 "python" "data" "intermediate"

# Barcha elementlar
SMEMBERS tags:course1

# Element bormi?
SISMEMBER tags:course1 "python"
# 1 = bor, 0 = yo'q

# Uzunlik
SCARD tags:course1

# Element o'chirish
SREM tags:course1 "beginner"

# Set operatsiyalari
SINTER tags:course1 tags:course2   # Kesishma (intersection)
SUNION tags:course1 tags:course2   # Birlashma (union)
SDIFF tags:course1 tags:course2    # Farq (difference)

# Tasodifiy element olish
SRANDMEMBER tags:course1 2
```

## 4. Hash (Lug'at)
Field-value juftliklari. Object/record saqlash uchun ideal.

```bash
# Hash yaratish
HSET user:100 name "Ali" email "ali@gmail.com" xp 250 course "Python"

# Field olish
HGET user:100 name
# Natija: "Ali"

# Barcha field-value
HGETALL user:100

# Ko'p field olish
HMGET user:100 name xp

# Field yangilash
HSET user:100 xp 300

# Raqam fieldni oshirish
HINCRBY user:100 xp 50

# Field bormi?
HEXISTS user:100 email

# Field o'chirish
HDEL user:100 course

# Barcha kalitlar
HKEYS user:100

# Barcha qiymatlar
HVALS user:100

# Uzunlik
HLEN user:100
```

## 5. Sorted Set (Tartiblangan to'plam)
Har elementga score (ball) beriladi va avtomatik saralanadi. Leaderboard uchun ideal!

```bash
# Element qo'shish (score, member)
ZADD leaderboard 250 "Ali"
ZADD leaderboard 400 "Barno"
ZADD leaderboard 180 "Jasur"
ZADD leaderboard 320 "Aziz"

# Score yangilash (xuddi ZADD)
ZADD leaderboard 260 "Ali"  # Ali ning score yangilandi

# Score bo'yicha o'sish tartibida
ZRANGE leaderboard 0 -1 WITHSCORES

# Score bo'yicha kamayish tartibida (Top N)
ZREVRANGE leaderboard 0 2 WITHSCORES  # Top 3

# Rank (o'rin) olish
ZRANK leaderboard "Ali"      # 0 dan boshlanadigan o'rin (o'sish)
ZREVRANK leaderboard "Ali"   # Kamayish tartibidagi o'rin

# Score olish
ZSCORE leaderboard "Barno"

# Score oralig'idagi elementlar
ZRANGEBYSCORE leaderboard 200 500
ZRANGEBYSCORE leaderboard 200 500 WITHSCORES LIMIT 0 10

# Uzunlik
ZCARD leaderboard

# Score bo'yicha elementlar soni
ZCOUNT leaderboard 200 400

# Element o'chirish
ZREM leaderboard "Jasur"

# Score oshirish
ZINCRBY leaderboard 50 "Ali"  # Ali ga 50 xp qo'shish
```

## Node.js da amaliy misol — SYNAPSE Leaderboard
```javascript
const Redis = require('ioredis');
const redis = new Redis();

// XP qo'shish
await redis.zadd('leaderboard', 250, 'user:Ali');
await redis.zincrby('leaderboard', 50, 'user:Ali');

// Top 10

// Foydalanuvchi o'rni
const rank = await redis.zrevrank('leaderboard', 'user:Ali');
console.log(`Ali ${rank + 1}-o'rinda`);
```

nazariya:
Redis — bu in-memory ma'lumotlar bazasi bo'lib, asosan kesh, session va real-time messaging uchun ishlatiladi. U disk-based ma'lumotlar bazalaridan (PostgreSQL, MySQL) farqli ravishda ma'lumotlarni RAM da saqlaydi, shuning uchun o'qish/yozish operatsiyalari millisekundlarda bajariladi.

**TTL (Time To Live) va EXPIRE**
TTL — bu kalitning qancha vaqt yashashini belgilovchi mexanizm. Masalan, foydalanuvchi sessiyasini 30 daqiqaga saqlashingiz mumkin.

```redis
# Oddiy SET bilan TTL
SET user:123 "mukhammad" EX 3600
# EX = sekundlarda, PX = millisekundlarda

# Mavjud kalitga TTL qo'shish
SET token:abc "xyz"
EXPIRE token:abc 1800

# TTL ni tekshirish
TTL token:abc
# Natija: 1800 (qolgan sekundlar)
# -1 = TTL yo'q (abadiy)
# -2 = kalit mavjud emas

# Aniq vaqtda tugash
EXPIREAT user:session:456 1893456000

# TTL ni o'chirish (abadiy qilish)
PERSIST token:abc
```

**SETEX va PSETEX (qisqa yozuv)**
```redis
SETEX otp:user123 300 "847291"
# = SET otp:user123 "847291" EX 300

PSETEX temp:data 5000 "hello"
# 5000 millisekund = 5 sekund
```

**Pub/Sub (Publish/Subscribe)**
Pub/Sub — bu real-time messaging pattern. Publisher xabar yuboradi, Subscriber esa uni qabul qiladi. Ular bir-birini bilmaydi.

```redis
# Terminal 1 (Subscriber)
SUBSCRIBE notifications
# Barcha xabarlarga obuna bo'lish:
PSUBSCRIBE news:*

# Terminal 2 (Publisher)
PUBLISH notifications "Yangi dars qo'shildi!"
PUBLISH news:sports "Milliy jamoamiz g'alaba qozondi"

# Obunani bekor qilish
UNSUBSCRIBE notifications
```

**Python bilan Pub/Sub misoli:**
```python
import redis
import threading

r = redis.Redis(host='localhost', port=6379)

def subscriber():
    pubsub = r.pubsub()
    pubsub.subscribe('chat:room1')
    for message in pubsub.listen():
        if message['type'] == 'message':
            print(f"Xabar: {message['data'].decode()}")

# Subscriber ni alohida thread da ishga tushirish
t = threading.Thread(target=subscriber)
t.daemon = True
t.start()

# Publisher
r.publish('chat:room1', 'Salom!')
r.publish('chat:room1', 'Redis ajoyib!')
```

**Amaliy foydalanish holatlari:**
- TTL: OTP kodlar (5 daqiqa), session tokenlar (30 daqiqa), kesh (1 soat)
- Pub/Sub: chat ilovalari, live notifications, microservice event broadcasting
- PSUBSCRIBE: pattern-based obuna (masalan, `user:*:events` barcha foydalanuvchilar eventlari)

**Muhim eslatma:** Redis Pub/Sub persistent emas — subscriber offline bo'lsa, o'tkazib yuborilgan xabarlarni qabul qila olmaydi. Bu holatda Redis Streams yoki message queue (RabbitMQ) ishlatish kerak.

quiz.B: Kalit abadiy — TTL belgilanmagan

quiz.savol: Redis Pub/Sub da subscriber offline bo'lganida publisher xabar yuborsa nima bo'ladi?
quiz.A: Xabar queue da saqlanadi va subscriber qaytib kelganda oladi
quiz.B: Xabar yo'qoladi — Pub/Sub persistent emas
quiz.tushuntirish: Redis Pub/Sub fire-and-forget pattern. Persistent messaging kerak bo'lsa Redis Streams yoki RabbitMQ ishlatiladi.

quiz.tushuntirish: SETEX key seconds value — EX (seconds) bilan SET ning qisqa shakli. PSETEX esa millisekund ishlatadi.

quiz.B: PSUBSCRIBE pattern (glob) bilan bir nechta kanallarga obuna bo'ladi

quiz.tushuntirish: PERSIST buyrug'i kalitdan TTL ni olib tashlaydi va uni persistent (abadiy) qiladi. TTL tekshirsangiz -1 qaytaradi.

nazariya:
Kesh — bu tez-tez so'raladigan ma'lumotlarni tezroq manbada (Redis) saqlash texnikasi. To'g'ri kesh strategiyasi ilovangizni sezilarli tezlashtiradi va ma'lumotlar bazasiga yukni kamaytiradi.

**1. Cache-Aside (Lazy Loading)**
Eng keng tarqalgan strategiya. Dastur avval keshdan qidiradi, topilmasa DB dan oladi va keshga yozadi.

```python
import redis
import json

r = redis.Redis(decode_responses=True)

def get_user(user_id: int):
    cache_key = f'user:{user_id}'
    
    # 1. Keshdan qidirish
    cached = r.get(cache_key)
    if cached:
        print('CACHE HIT')
        return json.loads(cached)
    
    # 2. DB dan olish (simulyatsiya)
    print('CACHE MISS — DB dan olinmoqda')
    user = db_query(f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id={user_id}')
    
    # 3. Keshga yozish (1 soat TTL)
    r.setex(cache_key, 3600, json.dumps(user))
    return user
```

**2. Write-Through**
Ma'lumot yozilganda ham DB ham kesh bir vaqtda yangilanadi.

```python
def update_user(user_id: int, data: dict):
    # DB ga yozish
    db_update('users', user_id, data)
    
    # Keshni ham yangilash
    cache_key = f'user:{user_id}'
    r.setex(cache_key, 3600, json.dumps(data))
    print('DB va kesh yangilandi')
```

**3. Write-Behind (Write-Back)**
Avval keshga yoziladi, DB ga keyinroq (async) yoziladi. Tezroq, lekin ma'lumot yo'qolish xavfi bor.

```python
def fast_write(user_id: int, data: dict):
    # Faqat keshga yozish
    r.setex(f'user:{user_id}', 3600, json.dumps(data))
    # Queue ga qo'shish
    r.rpush('db_write_queue', json.dumps({'id': user_id, 'data': data}))
```

**4. Cache Invalidation (Keshni bekor qilish)**
Ma'lumot o'zgarganda eski keshni o'chirish.

```python
def delete_user(user_id: int):
    db_delete('users', user_id)
    r.delete(f'user:{user_id}')  # Keshdan ham o'chirish
    # Bog'liq keshlarni ham o'chirish
    r.delete(f'user:profile:{user_id}')
    r.delete('users:all')  # List keshi ham eskirgan
```

**5. Cache Stampede muammosi va yechimi**
Ko'p foydalanuvchi bir vaqtda MISS bo'lsa, hammasi DB ga boradi.

```python
import time

def get_with_lock(key: str, fetch_fn):
    cached = r.get(key)
    if cached:
        return json.loads(cached)
    
    # Mutex lock
    lock_key = f'lock:{key}'
    if r.set(lock_key, 1, nx=True, ex=10):  # nx=True: faqat mavjud bo'lmasa
        try:
            data = fetch_fn()
            r.setex(key, 3600, json.dumps(data))
            return data
        finally:
            r.delete(lock_key)
    else:
        # Boshqa process yuklamoqda, kutish
        time.sleep(0.1)
        return get_with_lock(key, fetch_fn)
```

**6. LRU Eviction Policy**
Redis RAM to'lganda eski/kam ishlatilgan kalitlarni o'chiradi.

```redis
# redis.conf da sozlash
maxmemory 256mb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
# Boshqa policy lar:
# noeviction — xato qaytaradi
# allkeys-lfu — eng kam foydalanilgan
# volatile-lru — faqat TTL li kalitlar orasidan
```

**Kesh samaradorligini o'lchash:**
```redis
INFO stats
# keyspace_hits: 1000
# keyspace_misses: 50
# Hit rate = 1000/(1000+50) = 95.2%
```

**Qaysi strategiyani tanlash:**
- Ko'p o'qish, kam yozish → Cache-Aside
- Har doim yangi ma'lumot kerak → Write-Through
- Tezlik muhim, yo'qolish yo'q → Write-Behind + DB sync
- Oddiy kesh → TTL bilan Cache-Aside

quiz.savol: Cache-Aside strategiyasida 'CACHE MISS' nima degani?
quiz.B: So'ralgan ma'lumot keshda yo'q, DB dan olish kerak
quiz.tushuntirish: CACHE MISS = so'ralgan kalit keshda topilmadi. Natijada DB dan olindi va keshga yozildi. CACHE HIT esa keshdan muvaffaqiyatli topildi degani.

quiz.savol: Write-Through va Write-Behind strategiyalarining asosiy farqi nima?
quiz.B: Write-Through DB va keshni sinxron yangilaydi, Write-Behind keshni yangilab DB ga keyinroq yozadi
quiz.C: Write-Through faqat Redis, Write-Behind faqat PostgreSQL bilan ishlaydi
quiz.D: Ular bir xil, faqat nomlari boshqacha
quiz.tushuntirish: Write-Through: DB + kesh bir vaqtda (sekin lekin ishonchli). Write-Behind: avval kesh, DB ga async (tez lekin crash bo'lsa ma'lumot yo'qolishi mumkin).

quiz.savol: Cache Stampede muammosi qachon yuzaga keladi?
quiz.B: Ko'p foydalanuvchi bir vaqtda bir xil CACHE MISS ga duch kelganda
quiz.tushuntirish: Stampede: mashhur kalit expire bo'lganda, yuzlab request bir vaqtda DB ga boradi. Mutex lock yoki pre-computation bilan hal qilinadi.

quiz.savol: `maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru` nima qiladi?
quiz.B: RAM to'lganda eng kam ishlatilgan kalitlarni o'chiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: LRU = Least Recently Used. maxmemory chegarasi yetganda Redis eng uzoq vaqt ishlatilmagan kalitlarni o'chirib joy bo'shatadi.

quiz.savol: Qaysi kesh strategiyasida ma'lumot o'chirilganda bog'liq keshlarni ham o'chirish muhim?
quiz.B: Write-Behind
quiz.tushuntirish: Cache Invalidation — ma'lumot yangilanganda yoki o'chirilganda, bog'liq barcha kesh kalitlarini ham o'chirish kerak, aks holda eski ma'lumot ko'rsatiladi.

    r.setex(key, 600, json.dumps(post))

nazariya:
redis-py — Redis ning rasmiy Python kutubxonasi. U barcha Redis buyruqlarini Python metodlari sifatida taqdim etadi va asynchronous (aioredis) rejimni ham qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.

**O'rnatish va ulanish:**
```bash
pip install redis
```

```python
import redis

# Oddiy ulanish
r = redis.Redis(
    host='localhost',
    port=6379,
    db=0,
    password=None,
    decode_responses=True  # bytes o'rniga str qaytaradi
)

# Connection Pool (production uchun tavsiya)
pool = redis.ConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=6379, max_connections=10)
r = redis.Redis(connection_pool=pool)

# URL bilan ulanish
r = redis.from_url('redis://localhost:6379/0')
# SSL bilan
r = redis.from_url('rediss://user:password@host:6380/0')

# Ulanishni tekshirish
print(r.ping())  # True
```

**Asosiy ma'lumot turlari:**
```python
# String
r.set('name', 'Mukhammad')
print(r.get('name'))  # 'Mukhammad'
r.incr('counter')     # 1
r.incr('counter')     # 2
r.incrby('counter', 5)  # 7

# Hash (Python dict ga o'xshash)
r.hset('user:1', mapping={
    'name': 'Mukhammad',
    'age': '22',
    'city': 'Toshkent'
})
print(r.hget('user:1', 'name'))   # 'Mukhammad'
print(r.hgetall('user:1'))         # dict
r.hset('user:1', 'email', 'test@mail.com')  # yangi field
r.hdel('user:1', 'age')            # field o'chirish
print(r.hexists('user:1', 'age'))  # False

# List
r.rpush('queue', 'task1', 'task2', 'task3')
r.lpush('queue', 'urgent')  # boshiga qo'shish
print(r.llen('queue'))      # 4
print(r.lpop('queue'))      # 'urgent'
print(r.lrange('queue', 0, -1))  # barcha elementlar

# Set
r.sadd('tags', 'python', 'redis', 'backend')
r.sadd('tags', 'python')    # dublikat e'tiborga olinmaydi
print(r.scard('tags'))      # 3
print(r.smembers('tags'))   # {'python', 'redis', 'backend'}
print(r.sismember('tags', 'python'))  # True

# Sorted Set (score bilan)
r.zadd('leaderboard', {'mukhammad': 1500, 'ali': 1200, 'sara': 1800})
print(r.zrank('leaderboard', 'sara'))  # None (0-indexed, eng past)
print(r.zrevrank('leaderboard', 'sara'))  # 0 (birinchi)
print(r.zrange('leaderboard', 0, -1, withscores=True))
# [('ali', 1200.0), ('mukhammad', 1500.0), ('sara', 1800.0)]
```

**Pipeline — bulk operatsiyalar:**
```python
# Pipeline: ko'p buyruqni bir request da yuborish
pipe = r.pipeline()
for i in range(100):
    pipe.set(f'item:{i}', f'value_{i}')
    pipe.expire(f'item:{i}', 3600)

pipe.execute()  # Barcha 200 buyruq bir marta yuboriladi
# Pipeline transaction sifatida ham ishlatiladi:
pipe = r.pipeline(transaction=True)
pipe.incr('balance:user1')
pipe.decr('balance:user2')
pipe.execute()
```

**Scan — katta DB da kalitlarni qidirish:**
```python
# KEYS pattern — HECH QACHON productiondat ishlatmang!
# r.keys('user:*')  # Butun DB ni bloklaydi!

# SCAN — iterativ, xavfsiz
for key in r.scan_iter('user:*', count=100):
    print(key)

# Batch tozalash
pipe = r.pipeline()
for key in r.scan_iter('temp:*'):
    pipe.delete(key)
pipe.execute()
```

**Async Redis (aioredis):**
```python
import asyncio
from redis.asyncio import Redis

async def main():
    r = Redis(decode_responses=True)
    await r.set('async_key', 'hello')
    value = await r.get('async_key')
    print(value)  # 'hello'
    await r.aclose()

asyncio.run(main())
```

**Real loyiha: Rate Limiting:**
```python
def rate_limit(user_id: str, max_requests: int = 100, window: int = 3600) -> bool:
    key = f'rate:{user_id}:{int(time.time() // window)}'
    pipe = r.pipeline()
    pipe.incr(key)
    pipe.expire(key, window)
    results = pipe.execute()
    return results[0] <= max_requests
```

quiz.savol: redis-py da `decode_responses=True` parametri nima uchun ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Javoblarni bytes o'rniga Python str sifatida olish uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: Redis protocol bytes qaytaradi. decode_responses=True bo'lmasa r.get('key') b'value' (bytes) qaytaradi. True bo'lsa 'value' (str) qaytaradi.

quiz.savol: Redis Pipeline ning asosiy afzalligi nima?
quiz.B: Ko'p buyruqni bitta network round-trip da yuborib tezlikni oshiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: Har bir buyruq odatda alohida network request. Pipeline 100 ta buyruqni bitta request da yuboradi — network latency sezilarli kamayadi.

quiz.savol: Nima uchun `r.keys('user:*')` ni production da ishlatmaslik kerak?
quiz.B: U butun Redis DB ni bloklaydi va boshqa so'rovlarni to'xtatadi
quiz.tushuntirish: KEYS O(N) buyruq — barcha kalitlarni skanerlaydi va Redis single-threaded bo'lgani uchun bu vaqtda boshqa operatsiyalar kutadi. scan_iter() esa iterativ ishlaydi.

quiz.savol: Redis Sorted Set da `zrevrank` buyrug'i nimani qaytaradi?
quiz.B: Elementni kamayish tartibidagi o'rnini (birinchi = 0)
quiz.tushuntirish: zrank = o'sish tartibida (eng past score = 0). zrevrank = kamayish tartibida (eng yuqori score = 0). Leaderboard uchun zrevrank qulay.

quiz.savol: Connection Pool nima uchun oddiy Redis ulanishdan yaxshiroq?
quiz.B: Har so'rovda yangi TCP ulanish ochishdan saqlanib tezlikni oshiradi
quiz.tushuntirish: Har gal yangi ulanish ochish TCP handshake vaqt oladi. Connection Pool tayyor ulanishlar to'plamini saqlaydi — so'rov kelganda darhol ishlatiladi.

nazariya:
Normalizatsiya — ma'lumotlar bazasini to'g'ri strukturalash jarayoni. Maqsad: ma'lumotlar takrorlanishini (redundancy) kamaytirish, anomaliyalarni (insert, update, delete anomaly) oldini olish.

**Normalizatsiyasiz muammo (unnormalized):**
```
Orders jadval:
order_id | customer_name | customer_email   | product1 | product2 | city
1        | Ali Karimov   | ali@mail.com     | Laptop   | Mouse    | Toshkent
2        | Ali Karimov   | ali@mail.com     | Keyboard | NULL     | Toshkent
```
Muammo: Ali email o'zgartirsa, 2 joyda o'zgartirishimiz kerak (update anomaly).

**1NF (First Normal Form) — Atomik qiymatlar**
Qoidalar:
- Har katak faqat bitta (atomik) qiymat
- Takrorlanadigan guruhlar yo'q (product1, product2...)
- Har qator unique (primary key bor)

```sql
-- 1NF BUZILGAN:
CREATE TABLE bad_orders (
  order_id INT,
  customer_name VARCHAR,
  products VARCHAR  -- 'Laptop, Mouse, Keyboard' — atomik emas!
);

-- 1NF TO'G'RI:
CREATE TABLE order_items (
  order_id INT,
  customer_name VARCHAR,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  PRIMARY KEY (order_id, product_name)
);
```

**2NF (Second Normal Form) — To'liq funksional bog'liqlik**
1NF bo'lishi shart. Qo'shimcha qoida:
- Har non-key attribute BUTUN primary key ga bog'liq bo'lishi kerak (composite key da)

```sql
-- 2NF BUZILGAN (composite PK: order_id + product_id):
-- customer_name faqat order_id ga bog'liq, product_id ga emas!
CREATE TABLE bad_order_items (
  order_id     INT,
  product_id   INT,
  customer_name VARCHAR,  -- Faqat order_id ga bog'liq — PARTIAL DEPENDENCY!
  quantity     INT,       -- order_id + product_id ga bog'liq — OK
  PRIMARY KEY (order_id, product_id)
);

-- 2NF TO'G'RI — ajratish:
CREATE TABLE orders (
  order_id    INT PRIMARY KEY,
  customer_id INT,
  order_date  DATE
);

CREATE TABLE order_items (
  order_id   INT,
  product_id INT,
  quantity   INT,
  PRIMARY KEY (order_id, product_id)
);
```

**3NF (Third Normal Form) — Tranzitiv bog'liqlik yo'q**
2NF bo'lishi shart. Qo'shimcha qoida:
- Non-key attribute boshqa non-key attribute ga bog'liq bo'lmasin

```sql
-- 3NF BUZILGAN:
-- zip_code → city_name (city_name zip_code dan kelib chiqadi, PK dan emas)
CREATE TABLE bad_customers (
  customer_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  customer_name VARCHAR,
  zip_code    VARCHAR,
  city_name   VARCHAR  -- zip_code ga bog'liq — TRANSITIVE DEPENDENCY!
);

-- 3NF TO'G'RI:
CREATE TABLE customers (
  customer_id   INT PRIMARY KEY,
  customer_name VARCHAR,
  zip_code      VARCHAR,
  FOREIGN KEY (zip_code) REFERENCES zip_codes(zip_code)
);

CREATE TABLE zip_codes (
  zip_code  VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,
  city_name VARCHAR
);
```

**Amaliy to'liq misol — SYNAPSE platforma:**
```sql
-- Unnormalized:
-- enrollment_id | student_name | student_email | course_name | instructor_name | grade

-- 1NF: atomik qiymatlar (har xona bitta qiymat)
-- 2NF: ajratish
CREATE TABLE students (
  student_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100),
  email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE
);

CREATE TABLE courses (
  course_id   INT PRIMARY KEY,
  course_name VARCHAR(100),
  instructor_id INT
);

-- 3NF: instructor alohida jadval
CREATE TABLE instructors (
  instructor_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100),
  email VARCHAR(100)
);

CREATE TABLE enrollments (
  enrollment_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
  student_id  INT REFERENCES students(student_id),
  course_id   INT REFERENCES courses(course_id),
  grade       DECIMAL(3,1),
  enrolled_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);
```

**Qachon denormalize qilish kerak?**
Ba'zan JOIN lar juda sekin bo'lsa, ma'lumotlarni qayta birlashtirish (denormalization) mantiqiy:
- Data warehouse / analytics
- Ko'p o'qish, kam yozish hollari
- Reporting jadvallar

quiz.savol: 1NF qoidasiga ko'ra qaysi qator noto'g'ri?
quiz.A: Har katak bitta atomik qiymat saqlaydi
quiz.B: Jadvalda primary key bo'lishi shart
quiz.C: Bir katakda 'Python, JavaScript, Redis' saqlanishi mumkin
quiz.tushuntirish: 1NF: har katak atomik (bo'linmas) qiymat. 'Python, JavaScript, Redis' — bu bir nechta qiymat, 1NF buziladi. Alohida jadval yoki qatorlar kerak.

quiz.savol: 2NF qaysi muammoni hal qiladi?
quiz.B: Composite primary key da partial dependency (qisman bog'liqlik)
quiz.tushuntirish: 2NF: composite PK da har non-key attribute BUTUN PK ga bog'liq bo'lishi kerak. Agar ustun faqat PK ning bir qismiga bog'liq bo'lsa — partial dependency, 2NF buziladi.

quiz.savol: 3NF da 'tranzitiv bog'liqlik' nima degani?
quiz.B: PK → barcha ustunlar
quiz.tushuntirish: Tranzitiv: customer_id → zip_code → city_name. city_name PK ga emas, zip_code orqali bog'liq. Yechim: zip_codes alohida jadval.

quiz.savol: Normalizatsiyaning asosiy maqsadi nima?
quiz.B: Ma'lumot takrorlanishini va anomaliyalarni kamaytirish
quiz.tushuntirish: Normalizatsiya: redundancy (takrorlanish) kamaytirish, insert/update/delete anomaliyalarini oldini olish. Natijada ma'lumot bir joyda, o'zgarish bir joyda.

quiz.savol: Qachon denormalizatsiya (normalizatsiyadan voz kechish) mantiqli?
quiz.B: Analytics va reporting uchun ko'p o'qiladigan, kam yoziladigan jadvallarda
quiz.tushuntirish: Data warehouse, reporting, BI tizimlarida ko'p JOIN sekin bo'lishi mumkin. Bu hollarda denormalization (takrorlash) qabul qilinadi — tezlik > izchillik.

nazariya:
ER (Entity-Relationship) diagram — ma'lumotlar bazasi strukturasini vizual ko'rsatish vositasi. Jadvallar, ular orasidagi bog'liqliklar va atributlarni grafik shaklda tasvirlaydi.

**Asosiy elementlar:**
- **Entity (Varliq)** — haqiqiy dunyo ob'ekti (Students, Courses, Orders)
- **Attribute (Atribut)** — entity ning xususiyati (name, email, created_at)
- **Relationship (Bog'liqlik)** — entitiylar orasidagi aloqa
- **Cardinality** — bog'liqlik nisbati (1:1, 1:N, M:N)

**Cardinality turlari:**
```
One-to-One (1:1):
  User ──── Profile
  (Bir foydalanuvchining bir profili)

One-to-Many (1:N):
  Customer ──── Orders
  (Bir mijoz ko'p buyurtma)

Many-to-Many (M:N):
  Students ──── Courses
  (Ko'p talaba ko'p kursga yozilgan)
  Bu holda junction table kerak!
```

**SQL da ER implement qilish:**
```sql
-- 1:1 relationship (User - Profile)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id       SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  email    VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE user_profiles (
  user_id    INT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  full_name  VARCHAR(100),
  avatar_url VARCHAR(255),
  bio        TEXT,
  xp         INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- 1:N relationship (Course - Lessons)
CREATE TABLE courses (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  title       VARCHAR(200),
  direction   VARCHAR(50),  -- python, web, telegram...
  created_at  TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE lessons (
  id         SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  course_id  INT NOT NULL REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  week_number INT NOT NULL,
  title      VARCHAR(200),
  theory     TEXT,
  order_num  INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- M:N relationship (Students - Courses)
-- Junction table (enrollments)
CREATE TABLE enrollments (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  student_id  INT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  course_id   INT REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  enrolled_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  progress    INT DEFAULT 0,
  UNIQUE(student_id, course_id)  -- bir talaba bir kursga bir marta
);
```

**ON DELETE va ON UPDATE strategiyalari:**
```sql
-- CASCADE: parent o'chsa, child ham o'chadi
FOREIGN KEY (course_id) REFERENCES courses(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

-- SET NULL: parent o'chsa, FK null bo'ladi
FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

-- RESTRICT: parent o'chirishdan oldini oladi (child bor bo'lsa)
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT

-- SET DEFAULT: FK default qiymatga o'tadi
FOREIGN KEY (dept_id) REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET DEFAULT
```

**To'liq SYNAPSE ER dizayn:**
```sql
-- Asosiy jadvallar:
-- users (1) ──── (N) enrollments (N) ──── (1) courses
-- users (1) ──── (N) lesson_progress
-- lessons (1) ──── (N) lesson_progress
-- users (1) ──── (N) support_tickets
-- users (1) ──── (1) user_profiles

CREATE TABLE lesson_progress (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id     INT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  lesson_id   INT REFERENCES lessons(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  completed   BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  score       INT DEFAULT 0,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE(user_id, lesson_id)
);
```

**ER diagram vositalari:**
- dbdiagram.io — online, SQL eksport
- draw.io — universal
- pgAdmin — PostgreSQL uchun
- Mermaid (kod bilan):

```mermaid
erDiagram
    USERS ||--o{ ENROLLMENTS : "has"
    COURSES ||--o{ ENROLLMENTS : "has"
    COURSES ||--o{ LESSONS : "contains"
    USERS ||--o{ LESSON_PROGRESS : "tracks"
    LESSONS ||--o{ LESSON_PROGRESS : "tracked"
```

quiz.savol: Many-to-Many (M:N) bog'liqlikni implement qilish uchun nima kerak?
quiz.B: Junction (pivot) jadval yaratish ikki FK bilan
quiz.D: M:N mumkin emas, 1:N ga o'tkazish kerak
quiz.tushuntirish: Students-Courses M:N: enrollments junction jadval student_id (FK→students) va course_id (FK→courses) bilan. UNIQUE(student_id, course_id) bir talaba bir kursga bir marta.

quiz.savol: `ON DELETE CASCADE` Foreign Key da nima qiladi?
quiz.A: Parent o'chirib bo'lmaydi, agar child bo'lsa
quiz.B: Parent o'chirilganda unga bog'liq barcha child qatorlar ham o'chadi
quiz.tushuntirish: CASCADE: User o'chirilsa uning barcha lesson_progress, enrollments, tickets ham o'chadi. Orphan data qolmaydi.

quiz.savol: 1:1 relationship jadvalda qanday implement qilinadi?
quiz.A: Ikkala jadvalda bir xil PRIMARY KEY ishlatish
quiz.B: Child jadvalning PK si Parent jadvalning FK si bo'ladi UNIQUE bilan
quiz.tushuntirish: user_profiles jadvalida user_id ham PRIMARY KEY ham FOREIGN KEY. Bu bir profil faqat bitta userni, bitta user faqat bitta profilni ta'minlaydi.

quiz.savol: ER diagramda Cardinality nima?
quiz.B: Entitiylar orasidagi bog'liqlik nisbati (1:1, 1:N, M:N)
quiz.tushuntirish: Cardinality: bir entity qancha boshqa entity bilan bog'lanishi mumkinligi. Masalan, bir Customer ko'p Orders (1:N), bir talaba ko'p kursga yozilgan va kurs ko'p talabaga ega (M:N).

quiz.savol: `ON DELETE SET NULL` qachon ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Child ma'lumoti parent o'chirilganda yo'qolmasin, lekin bog'liqlik uzilsin
quiz.tushuntirish: Masalan: Category o'chirilsa, product.category_id → NULL. Mahsulot saqlanib qoladi, faqat kategoriyasiz bo'ladi. FK ustun NULL qabul qilishi kerak.

nazariya:
Database xavfsizligi — muhim va ko'pincha e'tibordan chetda qoladigan mavzu. To'g'ri sozlanmagan ruxsatlar ma'lumotlar sizib chiqishi yoki yo'qolishiga olib keladi.

**PostgreSQL Roles va Privileges:**
```sql
-- Rol yaratish
CREATE ROLE readonly_user WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'secure_pass123';
CREATE ROLE app_user WITH LOGIN PASSWORD 'app_pass456';
CREATE ROLE admin_user WITH LOGIN CREATEDB CREATEROLE PASSWORD 'admin789';

-- Foydalanuvchi yaratish (CREATE ROLE + LOGIN)
CREATE USER synapse_app WITH PASSWORD 'production_secret';

-- Privilege berish
GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE synapse TO synapse_app;
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO synapse_app;

-- Jadval ruxsatlari
GRANT SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE ON users TO synapse_app;
GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO readonly_user;
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON TABLE admin_logs TO admin_user;

-- Sequence ruxsatlari (SERIAL kolumnalar uchun)
GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA public TO synapse_app;

-- Ruxsatni olib qo'yish
REVOKE DELETE ON users FROM synapse_app;
REVOKE ALL PRIVILEGES ON TABLE sensitive_data FROM app_user;
```

**Row Level Security (RLS):**
Foydalanuvchi faqat o'z ma'lumotini ko'rsin.

```sql
-- RLS yoqish
ALTER TABLE orders ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Policy yaratish
CREATE POLICY user_orders ON orders
  USING (customer_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id')::INT);

-- Application dan foydalanish:
-- SET app.current_user_id = '42';
-- SELECT * FROM orders;  -- Faqat customer_id=42 qatorlar ko'rinadi

-- Admin hammani ko'rsin
CREATE POLICY admin_all ON orders
  TO admin_role
  USING (true);
```

**SSL/TLS ulanish:**
```bash
# postgresql.conf
ssl = on
ssl_cert_file = 'server.crt'
ssl_key_file  = 'server.key'

# pg_hba.conf — hostssl faqat SSL ruxsat beradi
hostssl  all  all  0.0.0.0/0  scram-sha-256
```

```python
# Python bilan SSL ulanish
import psycopg2

conn = psycopg2.connect(
    host='db.example.com',
    port=5432,
    database='synapse',
    user='synapse_app',
    password='secret',
    sslmode='require',       # require/verify-ca/verify-full
    sslrootcert='ca.crt',    # CA sertifikat
    sslcert='client.crt',
    sslkey='client.key'
)
```

```javascript

const { Pool } = require('pg');
const pool = new Pool({
  connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL,

  }

```

**SQL Injection oldini olish:**
```python
# XAVFLI — SQL Injection ga ochiq!
query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{user_input}'"
# Agar user_input = "' OR '1'='1" bo'lsa, barcha userlar chiqadi!

# XAVFSIZ — Parameterized query
cursor.execute(
    "SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = %s AND password = %s",
    (email, password)  # Avtomatik escape qilinadi
)

# Node.js bilan
const result = await pool.query(
    'SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = $1',
    [userEmail]
);
```

**Audit Logging:**
```sql
-- Muhim operatsiyalarni log qilish
CREATE TABLE audit_log (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  table_name  VARCHAR(50),
  operation   VARCHAR(10),  -- INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
  user_name   VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT current_user,
  changed_at  TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  old_data    JSONB,
  new_data    JSONB
);

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION log_changes()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO audit_log(table_name, operation, old_data, new_data)
  VALUES (TG_TABLE_NAME, TG_OP, row_to_json(OLD)::jsonb, row_to_json(NEW)::jsonb);
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER users_audit
AFTER UPDATE OR DELETE ON users
FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION log_changes();
```

**Amaliy xavfsizlik checklist:**
- Hech qachon `postgres` superuser ni app dan ishlatmang
- Minimal ruxsat prinsipi (least privilege)
- Barcha ulanishlar SSL bilan
- Parollar .env da, kodni git ga olmang
- SQL Injection uchun faqat parameterized query
- Muhim jadvallar uchun audit log

quiz.savol: PostgreSQL da `GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES` va `GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON TABLE` ning farqi nima?
quiz.B: SELECT faqat o'qish, ALL PRIVILEGES — barcha operatsiyalar (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP)
quiz.D: SELECT kelajakdagi jadvallarga ham amal qiladi
quiz.tushuntirish: GRANT SELECT — faqat o'qish. GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES — SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE, REFERENCES, TRIGGER. Minimal ruxsat prinsipi: har role ga faqat keragini bering.

quiz.savol: Row Level Security (RLS) nima uchun ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Foydalanuvchi faqat o'ziga tegishli qatorlarni ko'rishi uchun
quiz.tushuntirish: RLS: multi-tenant ilovalar uchun ideal. SELECT * FROM orders — RLS yoqilsa, har foydalanuvchi faqat o'z buyurtmalarini ko'radi, hatto query bir xil bo'lsa ham.

quiz.savol: SQL Injection hujumidan himoya qilishning eng to'g'ri usuli?
quiz.B: Parameterized query (prepared statements) ishlatish
quiz.tushuntirish: Parameterized query: user ma'lumotlari SQL kodidan ajralgan. %s yoki $1 placeholders driver tomonidan escape qilinadi — injection imkonsiz.

quiz.savol: PostgreSQL sslmode='verify-full' nima degani?
quiz.B: SSL + server sertifikatini CA orqali tekshirish + hostname mos kelishi
quiz.tushuntirish: verify-full — eng xavfsiz: shifrlash + CA sertifikat tekshirish + server hostname mos kelishi. MITM hujumidan to'liq himoya. require — faqat shifrlash, sertifikat tekshirilmaydi.

quiz.savol: Audit trigger nima uchun kerak?
quiz.B: Muhim jadvallardagi o'zgarishlarni kim, qachon, nima o'zgartirgani log qilish
quiz.tushuntirish: Audit log: AFTER UPDATE OR DELETE triggerda old_data va new_data JSONB da saqlanadi. Kim, qachon, nima o'zgartirgani — compliance, xavfsizlik, debugging uchun muhim.

nazariya:
Database migration — ma'lumotlar bazasi sxemasini versiyalash va boshqarish jarayoni. Git code ni versiyalagandek, migration DB o'zgarishlarini versiyalaydi va jamoada hamkor ishni osonlashtiradi.

**Nima uchun migration kerak?**
- `ALTER TABLE` qo'lda bajarish xavfli va takrorlanmaydi
- Yangi developer loyihani o'rnatganda DB sxemasi yo'q
- Production deploy da DB o'zgarishlarini avtomatlashtirilgan qilish
- Rollback imkoniyati

**Flyway — Java/SQL based migration:**
```bash
# O'rnatish (Maven)
<dependency>
  <groupId>org.flywaydb</groupId>
  <artifactId>flyway-core</artifactId>
</dependency>

# Yoki CLI
docker run flyway/flyway -url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost/synapse migrate
```

```

**Python bilan Alembic (SQLAlchemy):**

```

```python
# alembic/versions/001_create_users.py
def upgrade():
    op.create_table('users',
        sa.Column('id', sa.Integer(), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column('username', sa.String(50), nullable=False, unique=True),
        sa.Column('email', sa.String(100), nullable=False),
        sa.Column('xp', sa.Integer(), default=0)
    )
    op.create_index('idx_users_email', 'users', ['email'])

def downgrade():
    op.drop_index('idx_users_email')
    op.drop_table('users')
```

```bash
alembic upgrade head     # Oxirgi versiyaga
alembic downgrade -1     # Bir orqaga
alembic current          # Joriy versiya
alembic history          # Barcha versiyalar
```

**Railway + Migration best practices:**
```bash
# Dockerfile yoki Procfile
# Deploy dan oldin migration bajariladi
release: python manage.py migrate
# yoki
release: npx db-migrate up --config database.json --env production
```

**Muhim qoidalar:**
- Bajarilgan migration fayllarini HECH QACHON o'zgartirmang
- Har migration atomic (commit yoki rollback)
- Katta jadval o'zgarishlarida CONCURRENT indeks yaratingCREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY
- Down migration (rollback) ham yozing

quiz.savol: Flyway da `V3__add_column.sql` fayl nomidagi `V3` nima degani?
quiz.B: Migration versiya raqami — tartib uchun ishlatiladi
quiz.tushuntirish: Flyway V{version}__{description}.sql nomlanishini kutadi. V1, V2, V3... — tartib bo'yicha bajariladi. Bajarilgan migration checksum bilan saqlanadi, o'zgartirib bo'lmaydi.

quiz.savol: Nima uchun bajarilgan migration fayllarini o'zgartirmaslik kerak?
quiz.B: Flyway checksum tekshiradi — o'zgartirilgan fayl xato beradi, barcha serverlarda inconsistency bo'ladi
quiz.tushuntirish: Flyway har migration ning checksum ini saqlaydi. Fayl o'zgartirilsa checksum mos kelmaydi va migration muvaffaqiyatsiz tugaydi. Yangi o'zgarish uchun yangi V{n+1} fayl yarating.

quiz.savol: Alembic da `alembic downgrade -1` nima qiladi?
quiz.B: Oxirgi 1 ta migration ni rollback qiladi
quiz.tushuntirish: `downgrade -1` — joriy versiyadan bir qaddam orqaga. `downgrade base` — barchasini rollback. `upgrade head` — eng oxirgi versiyaga.

quiz.savol: `CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY` oddiy `CREATE INDEX` dan qanday farq qiladi?
quiz.B: Jadval bloklanmaydi — production da foydalanuvchi so'rovlari to'xtatilmaydi
quiz.tushuntirish: Oddiy CREATE INDEX: jadval lock qilinadi, boshqa so'rovlar kutadi. CONCURRENTLY: background da yaratiladi, jadval bo'sh qoladi — katta production jadvallarda muhim.

quiz.savol: Railway deploy da migration avtomatik bajarish uchun qaysi fayl ishlatiladi?
quiz.B: Procfile yoki nixpacks.toml da release buyrug'i
quiz.tushuntirish: Railway Procfile dagi `release:` komanda deploy oldidan bajariladi. `release: npx db-migrate up` — deploy har safar yangi migrationlarni bajaradi.

nazariya:
Haqiqiy loyihalarda bir nechta ma'lumotlar bazasi birgalikda ishlatiladi. Har birining kuchli tomonlari bor — to'g'ri tanlash arxitektura muvaffaqiyatini belgilaydi.

**Asosiy ma'lumotlar bazalari va ularning nishi:**

**PostgreSQL — Asosiy relational DB**
- Strukturali ma'lumotlar (foydalanuvchilar, buyurtmalar, transaksiyalar)
- ACID kafolatlar muhim bo'lsa
- Murakkab JOIN va so'rovlar
- JSON/JSONB — gibrid yondashuv

```sql
-- PostgreSQL kuchli: murakkab so'rovlar
SELECT u.username,
       COUNT(e.id) as courses_count,
       SUM(lp.score) as total_score
FROM users u
JOIN enrollments e ON u.id = e.student_id
JOIN lesson_progress lp ON u.id = lp.user_id
WHERE u.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY u.id
HAVING COUNT(e.id) > 2
ORDER BY total_score DESC;
```

**Redis — In-memory cache va real-time**
- Session management
- Kesh (tez-tez o'qiladigan ma'lumotlar)
- Rate limiting
- Leaderboard (Sorted Set)
- Pub/Sub, real-time notifications
- Job queues

**MongoDB — Document store**
- Moslashuvchan sxema (sxema ko'p o'zgarganda)
- Nested ma'lumotlar (post + comments + reactions bitta dokument)
- Logging, analytics events
- Content management

```javascript
// MongoDB kuchli: nested document
db.lessons.insertOne({
  title: 'Redis TTL',
  quiz: [
    { question: 'TTL nima?', options: ['A','B','C'], answer: 'A' },
    { question: 'EXPIRE nima?', options: ['A','B'], answer: 'B' }
  ],
  theory: { uz: '...', ru: '...', en: '...' }
});
```

**Elasticsearch — Full-text search**
- Matn qidirish (Google kabi)
- Log analitika (ELK stack)
- Autocomplete, fuzzy search

```python
# Elasticsearch qidirish
result = es.search(index='lessons', body={
  'query': {
    'multi_match': {
      'query': 'redis kesh',
      'fields': ['title', 'theory'],
      'fuzziness': 'AUTO'
    }
  }
})
```

**ClickHouse — Analytics va time-series**
- Milliardlab qatorni tez hisoblash
- Dashboard, reporting
- Time-series ma'lumotlar
- Column-store — aggregation uchun ideal

**SQLite — Embedded, yengil**
- Mobile ilovalar
- Development/testing
- Kichik desktop ilovalar
- Edge computing
